payload.answer: No new memory committed because this appears to be a retry of an already-seen Slack event ID.
citations: Input: "Same Slack event ID delivered twice for - Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans"

entity_resolution.reason: The same Slack event ID was delivered twice. Retries should not create a second durable memory write.

details: Suppressed additional memory creation to avoid duplicate durable state.

repair_options: Deduplicate by Slack event ID and only allow the first delivery to create memory.
If the first delivery was not actually persisted, reprocess exactly once from the original event record.
